---
name: Project Proposal
about: Propose a new project or initiative for the Working Group to take on
title: '"[PROJECT] Project name here"'
labels: project proposal
assignees: ''

---

## Project Overview

**Project name:** *(what are you calling this project?)*
**Proposed by:** @*(your GitHub handle)*
**Date proposed:** *(DD Month YYYY)*

---

## What Is This Project?

*(Describe the project in a few sentences. What is it? What will 
it produce or achieve?)*

---

## Why Does This Matter?

*(Explain why this project is worth the workgroup's time and 
energy. How does it serve the community? How does it connect 
to Everything Open Source's mission or the workgroup's 2026 goals?)*

---

## What Will This Project Produce?

*(Be as specific as possible. Check all that apply.)*

- [ ] A written guide or playbook
- [ ] A template or framework
- [ ] A curated resource library
- [ ] A documented process
- [ ] A community program or initiative
- [ ] A workshop or event
- [ ] A piece of content for YouTube or social media
- [ ] Research or a report
- [ ] Other: *(specify)*

---

## Scope and Timeline

**Estimated start date:** *(when could this realistically begin?)*
**Estimated end date or milestone:** *(when would the first 
version or outcome be ready?)*

**Is this a one-time project or ongoing?**
- [ ] One-time project with a clear end point
- [ ] Ongoing initiative with regular updates

**How much time per week do you estimate this will require?**
*(e.g. 2 to 3 hours per week across the team)*

---

## Who Is Needed?

**Are you willing to lead this project?**
- [ ] Yes, I want to lead this
- [ ] I can co-lead but need a partner
- [ ] I am proposing it but need someone else to lead

**What skills or roles are needed to complete this project?**

- [ ] Writing and documentation
- [ ] Research
- [ ] Community management experience
- [ ] Design
- [ ] Technical or GitHub skills
- [ ] Video or content creation
- [ ] Project coordination
- [ ] Other: *(specify)*

**How many people do you think are needed?**
*(e.g. 2 to 3 contributors over 4 weeks)*

---

## How Will We Know It Is Done?

*(What does success look like? List 2 to 3 specific outcomes 
or deliverables that would mark this project as complete.)*

- *(e.g. A published onboarding playbook in the resources folder)*
- *(e.g. At least 10 community members have used and given 
  feedback on the framework)*
- *(e.g. The workgroup blueprint is reviewed and approved by 
  the core team)*

---

## Anything Else?

*(Any additional context, links, inspiration, or notes that 
would help the workgroup evaluate this proposal?)*

---

*Project proposals will be reviewed at the next workgroup 
meeting. The workgroup leads will follow up in this issue 
with a decision and next steps. Thank you for bringing 
your ideas to the community!*
